steps.title: Identify the given value of y
steps.content: The second equation $y = 19$ directly tells us the $y$-coordinate of our solution. We don't need to solve for $y$; we already have it.

steps.title: Substitute to find x
steps.content:
Substitute $y = 19$ into the first equation:

$$19 = 4x - 9$$

Add 9 to both sides:

$$28 = 4x$$

Divide by 4:

$$x = 7$$

The solution is $(7, 19)$. That matches choice B — B is correct.
